test.command: bun run lint && bun run test --run && uv run pytest -q && npx playwright test

blockingIssues.description: Approve-path Playwright test does not assert post-approval expected output/completion content; it only checks that Approve/Deny controls disappear and deny state is absent, leaving VAL-PW-006 end-state under-validated.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/environment.md to document Playwright backend env contract: COVALT_GENERATE_TS=0 and COVALT_E2E_TESTS=1 for Playwright runs, while general backend/dev startup keeps COVALT_GENERATE_TS=1.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a validation-artifact convention requiring immutable commit references (full SHA) and run-derived generatedAt metadata in evidence JSON artifacts used for transition/gating claims.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: playwright-persistence-flow-and-legacy-e2e-cutover review found transition artifact entries using commit="working-tree" and fixed timestamp values, reducing auditability of ordering claims.

rejectedObservations.observation: Mission environment docs are missing COVALT_E2E_TESTS and Playwright-specific COVALT_GENERATE_TS behavior.
Playwright worker handoff did not include artifact paths even though the skill asks for them.
